/src/Exit.cc.summary: Implements the Exit class functionality for room-to-room connections, including initialization from prototypes, flag state management, and helper methods for direction handling.

/src/wiz_admin.cc.summary: Implements basic administrative functions and essential game management commands for immortal-level administrators

/src/ObjectPrototype.cc.summary: Implements object template loading from area files with specialized handling for different item types and their custom property values.

/src/help.cc.summary: Implements the game's help system, including help file loading, database integration, search capabilities, and category-based organization of help content.

/src/MobProg.cc.summary: Implements mobile program scripting for NPCs, including type conversions.

/src/Auction.cc.summary: Implements the game's auction system for player-to-player item sales, including bidding mechanics, timing, and result handling.

/src/channels.cc.summary: Implements broadcast chat channels (gossip, auction, etc.) with toggling, history tracking, and permission controls.

/src/wiz_quest.cc.summary: Implements quest management system including creation, tracking, rewards, and special event controls

/src/interp.cc.summary: Implements the command interpretation system, including command parsing, lookup, and dispatch functionality. Contains the extensive command table and `interpret()` function that processes all user input.

/src/String.cc.summary: Implements string manipulation utilities, including case-insensitive comparisons and searches.

/src/remort.cc.summary: Implements the character advancement system allowing high-level characters to restart with enhanced abilities.

/src/clan-edit.cc.summary: Implements clan management functionality including clan creation, editing, persistence, and member tracking with database integration.

/src/departed.cc.summary: Implements functionality for managing departed immortals, including loading and saving lists.

/src/Room.cc.summary: Implements room instance creation, character movement tracking, and environmental state management like light levels.

/src/const.cc.summary: Implements game constant definitions including skill and spell tables, skill groups, race/class skill bonuses, and skill level requirements.

/src/act_comm.cc.summary: Implements core communication commands including say, tell, whisper, and emote with visibility checking and formatting for different perspectives.

/src/Battle.cc.summary: A minimal implementation file containing only the declaration of a global battle object.

/src/GameTime.cc.summary: Implements game time tracking with conversions between real-time and game calendar, and provides sunlight cycle information based on in-game hours.

/src/Note.cc.summary: Implements the bulletin board system with multiple themed boards, note creation/editing/deletion, and unread message tracking.

/src/Shop.cc.summary: Implements shop functionality, including trade types, profit margins, and operating hours.

/src/Area.cc.summary: Implements area loading from files, area initialization, reset mechanics, and tracking of players/immortals in areas.

/src/mobiles.cc.summary: Implements NPC service functionality like healers, trainers, and merchants that players can interact with.

/src/special.cc.summary: Implements special procedures for NPCs, objects, and rooms that provide unique behaviors like shopkeepers, trainers, and guards.

/src/file.cc.summary: Implements file I/O utilities for reading and writing game data, including parsing for different data types and formats.

/src/ignore.cc.summary: Implements a multi-level player communication filtering system allowing players to selectively block different types of communication (tells, channels, etc.) from specific players with commands for adding, removing, and listing ignored players.

/src/ObjectValue.cc.summary: Implements operations for object values, including arithmetic and bitwise operations.

/src/mob_prog.cc.summary: Implements the mobile program scripting system with triggers, conditions, and commands that control NPC behavior and interaction.

/src/wiz_secure.cc.summary: Implements security and access control systems including ban management, account security, and privilege enforcement

/src/Player.cc.summary: Implements player initialization and tracking, including skill learning and evolution.

/src/act.cc.summary: Implements the core message formatting system for action feedback that shows different perspectives to different observers.

/src/load_config.cc.summary: Implements dynamic configuration file loading, parsing JSON-based configuration data to set runtime parameters and game settings with validation and error handling.

/src/music.cc.summary: Implements the bardic music system with songs, instruments, and performance effects that provide gameplay benefits.

/src/quest.cc.summary: Implements the automated quest system with mission generation, tracking, and rewards for player engagement.

/src/QuestArea.cc.summary: Implements quest area initialization and management, including locating the quest start room.

/src/lootv2.cc.summary: Implements an enhanced loot generation system building on the base loot tables with more sophisticated drop mechanics, improved rarity controls, and contextual treasure generation.

/src/dispel.cc.summary: Implements the dispel mechanics system, including dispellable effect types, level-based saving throws, and effect removal methods (dispel, cancel, undo).

/src/Character.cc.summary: Implements core character functionality including initialization, cleanup, and memory management for character resources and attributes.

/src/tables.cc.summary: Implements game data tables containing structured information for races, classes, skills, items, spells, and other core game mechanics.

/src/find.cc.summary: Implements target acquisition and search functionality for effects, including visibility checks, range validation, and target selection logic.

/src/War.cc.summary: Implements the clan war system with war declaration mechanics, event tracking, participant scoring, and war resolution logic.

/src/scan.cc.summary: Implements multi-directional area scanning functionality that extends player perception beyond the current room, with distance-based information filtering, visibility rules, and formatted output of detected entities.

/src/debug.cc.summary: Includes debugging utilities and commands for the game. Provides tools for developers to test and debug various game functionalities.

/src/storage.cc.summary: Implements an item storage system enabling players to store possessions between sessions across different locations, with capacity limits, access controls, and persistence mechanisms.

/src/duel.cc.summary: Implements the player dueling system with arenas, challenges, and structured player versus player combat.

/src/lookup.cc.summary: Implements entity lookup functionality for finding characters, objects, and rooms by various identifiers, with support for name matching, visibility rules, and scoped searches.

/src/Reset.cc.summary: Implements reset mechanics for game entities, including mobile and object resets.

/src/area_handler.cc.summary: Implements area management functionality including mobile and object creation, reset procedures, and prototype instantiation.

/src/Game.cc.summary: Defines global variables and functions related to game state, including logging controls (`log_all`) and time tracking (`current_time`).

/src/MobilePrototype.cc.summary: Implements mobile templates for creating NPCs with predefined attributes.

/src/wiz_build.cc.summary: Implements world building commands for creating and modifying game areas, rooms, objects, and mobiles

/src/wiz_gen.cc.summary: Implements core immortal functionality for character management, object/mobile control, security, and general administrative tasks

/src/Flags.cc.summary: Implements flag parsing and manipulation for game entities.

/src/rmagic.cc.summary: Implements enhanced magic system for remorted (high-level, advanced) characters with specialized spell effects and abilities.

/src/act_move.cc.summary: Implements movement commands and related location transitions including directional movement, special movement types, and visibility tracking.

/src/RoomPrototype.cc.summary: Implements room template loading from area files, handling sector type conversion and special room flags, and providing room instance creation.

/src/random.cc.summary: Implements random number generation functions used throughout the codebase for game randomization and chance calculations.

/src/typename.cc.summary: Implements runtime type information and name management utilities for object type identification, conversion, and comparison across the game's entity system.

/src/sqlite.cc.summary: Implements SQLite database interface with connection management, query execution, and result processing.

/src/Disabled.cc.summary: Implements functionality for disabling commands, including persistence of disabled commands to disk and command disabling verification.

/src/objstate.cc.summary: Implements object persistence between server restarts, ensuring items on the ground and their states remain intact, with special handling for quest items and modified containers.

/src/hunt.cc.summary: Implements the hunting/tracking system that allows players to follow other characters across the world, with skill-based success rates, environmental modifiers, trail detection algorithms, and directional guidance.

/src/paint.cc.summary: Implements the paintball minigame with specialized weapons, ammunition management, team assignments, scoring logic, and non-lethal combat mechanics for recreational player competition.

/src/mob_commands.cc.summary: Implements special commands available to NPCs through the mobile program system for actions like movement, combat, and quest interactions.

/src/fight.cc.summary: Implements the comprehensive combat system including attack resolution, damage calculation, defensive mechanics, and death handling.

/src/Weather.cc.summary: Implements dynamic weather system with seasonal variations, atmospheric pressure simulation, and changing sky conditions that affect gameplay.

/src/bank.cc.summary: Implements banking functionality, including deposit operations and bank location validation.

/src/edit.cc.summary: Implements editor functionality for game entities, handling modification of effects and their parameters, and providing tools for managing effect-related properties.

/src/ExitPrototype.cc.summary: Implements exit prototypes for rooms, including locks and flags.

/src/World.cc.summary: Implements central world management for areas, rooms, and world-level updates, providing a coordinator for all environment systems.

/src/act_obj.cc.summary: Implements object manipulation commands for inventory management, equipment handling, and item usage with restriction enforcement.

/src/flag.cc.summary: Implements flag-based state management for effects, handling flag manipulation, bitwise operations, and persistent effect states.

/src/act_info.cc.summary: Implements commands for gathering information about the game world, characters, and objects including look, examine, who, and score.

/src/Descriptor.cc.summary: Implements the connection descriptor class linking network connections to the state machine system that handles player login.

/src/magic.cc.summary: Implements the game's magical system, including spell execution framework, targeting, and individual spell effects. One of the largest files in the codebase containing hundreds of spell implementations.

/src/loot_tables.cc.summary: Implements the core loot distribution system with multi-tiered tables, weighted probabilities, monster-specific drops, and treasure generation algorithms that control item distribution throughout the game.

/src/set-stat.cc.summary: Implements comprehensive character attribute manipulation system including commands for viewing and modifying character stats, with permission controls, validation logic, and both temporary and permanent stat adjustments.

/src/update.cc.summary: Implements the central game update loop with pulse-based timing, managing periodic updates for characters, objects, combat, weather, and other game systems with specialized update frequencies.

/src/save.cc.summary: Implements character and object data persistence, handling saving and loading of player files and equipment in JSON format.

/src/Logging.cc.summary: Implements logging utilities for the game, including functions for reporting bugs, writing logs, and handling file-related errors. Provides formatted output and integrates with the game's debugging and notification systems.

/src/effects.cc.summary: Implements core effect application logic, handling temporary and permanent effects, effect stacking and overwriting, and effect timing and duration management.

/src/argument.cc.summary: Implements sophisticated command argument parsing utilities including number_argument for number-name format, one_argument for quote-aware tokenization, mult_argument for quantity parsing, and entity_argument for complex entity references.

/src/comm.cc.summary: Implements network communication including socket management, descriptor handling, input/output processing, and the main game loop.

/src/skills.cc.summary: Core implementation of the skill system including non-magical skills, learning mechanics, skill checks, practice system, skill groups, and character customization.

/src/memory.cc.summary: Implements memory management utilities defined in memory.hh, providing functionality for memory allocation tracking, leak detection, and memory usage statistics.

/src/wiz_coder.cc.summary: Implements debugging and development tools for monitoring system performance, memory usage, and other technical aspects

/src/Object.cc.summary: Implements object functionality, including cleanup and unique item generation.

/src/marry.cc.summary: Implements the character marriage system with proposal mechanics, ceremony management, relationship benefits, status tracking, and divorce handling for formal player-to-player social relationships.

/src/social.cc.summary: Implements the social action system with predefined emotive commands, multiple target support, and online social editing tools.

/src/attribute.cc.summary: Implements attribute accessors and stat-to-attribute mappings, including maximum stat retrieval for characters.

/src/alias.cc.summary: Implements the command aliasing system that allows players to create custom command shortcuts with parameter substitution, persistent storage, and security protections against recursive aliases and command abuse.

/src/RoomID.cc.summary: Implements room identification functionality with a compact representation combining vnum and instance number, providing parsing and formatting utilities.

/src/config.cc.summary: Implements game configuration management including settings storage, validation, and runtime adjustment of game parameters.

/src/handler.cc.summary: Implements core entity management functions for characters, objects, and affects, handling state transitions and updates.

/src/skill/skill_table.cc.summary: Implements skill table lookup functionality including name-to-skill mapping and skill type conversion

/src/util/Image.cc.summary: Implements ASCII art and visualization utilities for generating maps, diagrams, and other visual representations needed for in-game display and administrative tools.

/src/include/lootv2.hh.summary: Defines the enhanced loot generation system (LootV2) with advanced probability distribution for item drops, tiered rarity system, context-sensitive generation, and specialized drop tables.

/src/include/Character.hh.summary: Defines the Character class, representing a player or NPC. Includes stats, inventory, status flags, group/party info, and macros for attribute and permission checks.

/src/include/dispel.hh.summary: Declares interfaces for the dispel mechanics system that removes magical effects, with level-based calculations and support for different dispel variants like dispel magic and cancel.

/src/include/QuestArea.hh.summary: Defines the QuestArea class for specialized areas with quest-specific properties, including start room tracking, quest-related object handling, and mission state management.

/src/include/War.hh.summary: Defines the War class and related structures that implement the clan warfare system, including war declarations, scoring mechanics, victory conditions, peace negotiations, and timed war events.

/src/include/find.hh.summary: Declares the target finding system used by spells and effects, implementing sophisticated target acquisition with validity checking, range validation, and context-aware selection strategies.

/src/include/tables.hh.summary: Declares table structures and types for game data storage including races, classes, skills, items, spells, and conversion tables.

/src/include/macros.hh.summary: Defines utility macros used throughout the codebase, including debug helpers, logging shortcuts, memory management wrappers, common function patterns, and platform-specific adaptations.

/src/include/MobProgActList.hh.summary: Defines the action queue for NPCs, managing scheduled actions with prioritization, delayed execution capability, and safe command processing specific to mobile characters.

/src/include/file.hh.summary: Declares file I/O utility functions for loading and saving game data, with abstractions for file operations, error handling, and both text and binary file support.

/src/include/vt100.hh.summary: Defines VT100 terminal control sequences for cursor movement, screen clearing, color and attribute control, and special character display in terminal-based interfaces.

/src/include/ObjectValue.hh.summary: Defines the value system for objects with type-specific properties, providing specialized behavior for different object types (weapons, containers, food, etc.) through polymorphic value interpretation.

/src/include/act.hh.summary: Declares the core message formatting system for action feedback with token substitution for different perspectives (actor, target, observers) and visibility filtering based on context.

/src/include/Player.hh.summary: Extends the Character class with player-specific functionality including persistent data storage, configuration preferences, progression tracking, authentication, and customization options.

/src/include/StoredPlayer.hh.summary: Defines data structures for persisting player information to disk, including versioning and migration support.

/src/include/music.hh.summary: Defines the bardic music system including song effects, instrument types, performance skill integration, and area-based magical effects created through musical performances.

/src/include/GarbageCollectingList.hh.summary: Defines container classes for managing lists of garbage-collected objects with automatic cleanup, safe iteration during modifications, and deferred deletion during traversal.

/src/include/Pooled.hh.summary: Implements memory pooling for frequently allocated objects, reducing memory fragmentation and improving performance through pre-allocated memory blocks and efficient object recycling.

/src/include/ExtraDescr.hh.summary: Defines the ExtraDescr class that provides additional keyword-based descriptions for object features, enhancing world detail and enabling object puzzle mechanics through special descriptions.

/src/include/declare.hh.summary: Contains comprehensive forward declarations for classes, structs, global variables, and function prototypes to facilitate cross-component references while minimizing include dependencies.

/src/include/Location.hh.summary: Defines the Location class that represents precise positions in the game world, combining room references with position information for character/object positioning and relative location calculations.

/src/include/Guild.hh.summary: Defines the Guild class representing professional organizations for character specialization, providing skill-based advancement paths and profession-specific abilities.

/src/include/Room.hh.summary: Defines the Room class, representing a location in the game world. Manages exits, contents, affects, flags, and provides methods for character movement and room state.

/src/include/Garbage.hh.summary: Defines the Garbage base class for reference-counted objects, providing foundation for safe memory management with automatic cleanup when objects are no longer referenced.

/src/include/EQSocket.hh.summary: Defines the EQSocket class representing equipment socket system for item customization, handling socket creation, quality types, and integration with the gem enhancement system.

/src/include/GameTime.hh.summary: Defines the GameTime class that manages in-game time with hour/day/month/year tracking, time-based event triggering, and sunlight cycle calculations affecting gameplay.

/src/include/Battle.hh.summary: Defines the Battle class that manages the arena combat system, including battle state, level restrictions, and entry fees

/src/include/Area.hh.summary: Defines the Area class, representing a game region with rooms, objects, mobiles, vnum range, and metadata. Handles loading, updating, and resetting.

/src/include/Shop.hh.summary: Defines the Shop class implementing in-game merchants with opening hours, specialized merchandise, profit margins for buying/selling items, and shopkeeper interaction behaviors.

/src/include/Note.hh.summary: Defines the Note class and related structures for the bulletin board system, implementing multiple themed boards with permissions, read tracking, searching, and note manipulation functions.

/src/include/Exit.hh.summary: Defines the Exit class that represents connections between rooms, handling directions, door states (open/closed/locked), visibility rules, and access controls for room-to-room navigation.

/src/include/Clan.hh.summary: Defines the Clan class and related structures for player organizations, including hierarchical leadership roles, membership management, clan-specific permissions, and shared resources.

/src/include/Sector.hh.summary: Defines the Sector enumeration and utilities for room terrain types, determining movement costs, skill effects, environmental conditions, and visual representation on the world map.

/src/include/MobProg.hh.summary: Defines the MobProg system for NPC behavior scripting with trigger conditions, conditional execution, and flexible actions for defining complex NPC behaviors and interactions.

/src/include/ObjectPrototype.hh.summary: Defines templates for object creation with static properties, type-specific behaviors, and base attributes used to instantiate item instances throughout the game world.

/src/include/channels.hh.summary: Defines interfaces for the communication channel system including global, organizational, and special channels.

/src/include/Auction.hh.summary: Defines the Auction class that manages player-to-player item sales, including bidding mechanics, auction states, timing, cancellation handling, and notification systems.

/src/include/sql.hh.summary: Declares the SQLite database interface with connection pooling, transaction handling, prepared statement support, result set processing, and error handling mechanisms.

/src/include/String.hh.summary: Defines the String class, a std::string extension with case-insensitive comparisons, string utilities, and legacy C-string compatibility.

/src/include/Actable.hh.summary: Defines the Actable interface for entities that can perform actions, providing a common abstraction layer for action execution across different entity types.

/src/include/interp.hh.summary: Defines the command system structure including the command table, position requirements, and declarations for hundreds of command handler functions.

/src/include/comm.hh.summary: Declares core network communication functions for socket handling, data buffering, and connection management.

/src/include/memory.hh.summary: Declares memory management utilities for tracking allocations, detecting memory leaks, and providing allocation statistics and reporting for debugging memory-related issues.

/src/include/Object.hh.summary: Defines the Object class representing items in the game world, managing properties, location state, contained objects, affects, and item lifecycle from creation to destruction.

/src/include/Social.hh.summary: Defines the Social class representing pre-defined emotive commands with multiple target support, customized messages for different perspectives, and online editing capabilities for administrators.

/src/include/RoomID.hh.summary: Defines the RoomID class implementing a unique identifier system for room instances, combining virtual number with instance number to enable multiple instances of the same room template.

/src/include/World.hh.summary: Defines the World class serving as the central coordinator for the game environment, managing areas, tracking global state, handling world-wide updates, and controlling area reset scheduling.

/src/include/Tail.hh.summary: Defines the Tail class implementing a file monitoring utility with real-time display functionality, line buffer management, and dynamic file tracking for log monitoring.

/src/include/DepartedPlayer.hh.summary: Defines the DepartedPlayer class that maintains records of players/immortals who have left the game, supporting list traversal and persistence of departure information.

/src/include/magic.hh.summary: Defines the magic system's spell function type and declares hundreds of individual spell functions that comprise the game's magic system, organized by spell category and effect type.

/src/include/Descriptor.hh.summary: Defines the Descriptor class managing network connections, handling input/output buffers, connection states, authentication, character association, and telnet protocol negotiation.

/src/include/argument.hh.summary: Declares command argument parsing functions and defines entity flags used by entity_argument for parsing references to players, mobiles, objects, and rooms with both C and C++ string support.

/src/include/Vnum.hh.summary: Defines the Vnum class providing a type-safe virtual number identifier system for game entities, with range operations, comparisons, and serialization support for area-specific identification.

/src/include/telnet.hh.summary: Defines telnet protocol implementation including option negotiation, suboption processing, command codes, and protocol state tracking for network connections.

/src/include/merc.hh.summary: Defines foundational game structures and constants, providing core data structure definitions, historical system compatibility, global reference tables, and legacy macros.

/src/include/Logging.hh.summary: Defines the logging system interface with multiple severity levels, configurable output targets, context-enriched logging functions, and error reporting facilities.

/src/include/Disabled.hh.summary: Defines structures and functions for the command disabling system, allowing administrators to temporarily disable specific commands with reason tracking and persistence.

/src/include/RoomPrototype.hh.summary: Defines the RoomPrototype class serving as a template for creating room instances, storing base room properties such as descriptions, flags, sector type, and other attributes.

/src/include/random.hh.summary: Declares pseudorandom number generation utilities, including dice-style random rolls, range-based selection, and percentage chance calculations used throughout the game code.

/src/include/typename.hh.summary: Declares a type name resolution system that provides runtime type information, type comparison utilities, object type identification, and pretty-printing of type names.

/src/include/Weather.hh.summary: Defines the Weather class implementing a dynamic weather simulation with seasonal variations, sky conditions, atmospheric pressure tracking, room-specific effects, and forecasting capabilities.

/src/include/Format.hh.summary: Defines type-safe string formatting utilities for consistent text representation, string composition, type-aware formatting patterns, and parameter substitution with performance optimization.

/src/include/Edit.hh.summary: Defines the Edit class implementing an in-game text editor with line-based editing, string manipulation, and formatting capabilities for notes, descriptions, and other text content.

/src/include/ExitPrototype.hh.summary: Defines the ExitPrototype class serving as a template for creating Exit instances, storing base properties like destination, key requirements, flags, and descriptions for room connections.

/src/include/Duel.hh.summary: Defines the Duel class implementing the player versus player dueling system, including challenge management, arena handling, combat rules, spectator support, and duel resolution.

/src/include/constants.hh.summary: Defines core game constants including system limits, gameplay values, configuration parameters, and magic numbers used throughout the codebase for consistent operation.

/src/include/Reset.hh.summary: Defines the Reset class managing area respawn instructions, controlling mobile and object placement, equipment for mobiles, door states, and periodic world refreshing.

/src/include/lookup.hh.summary: Declares entity lookup functions for finding characters, objects, and rooms by various identifiers, supporting name-based and ID-based searches with visibility rules and fuzzy matching.

/src/include/MobilePrototype.hh.summary: Defines templates for NPC creation with base attributes, behaviors, equipment specifications, shop capabilities, and special flags that control mobile behavior parameters.

/src/include/Game.hh.summary: Defines the Game singleton that manages central game state, provides access to global subsystems, controls initialization and shutdown sequences, and maintains critical game variables.

/src/include/Flags.hh.summary: Defines the flag manipulation system used across components, supporting efficient bit operations, type-safe flag management, named flag constants, and operations for testing and modifying flag states.

/src/include/skill/skill.hh.summary: Declares core skill system interfaces and skill_table_t structure for managing skill properties and requirements, linking skill identifiers with their implementation and parameters.

/src/include/skill/Type.hh.summary: Defines the comprehensive skill::type enum class containing all possible skill types in the game, providing type-safe skill identification and categorization for the skill system.

/src/include/util/Image.hh.summary: Declares utilities for ASCII art generation and manipulation, including character-based drawing primitives, box and line drawing, screen buffer management, and multi-color text support.

/src/include/JSON/cJSON.hh.summary: Declares wrapper functions around the cJSON library, providing structured data serialization/deserialization and file operations for configuration and data storage.

/src/include/event/Handler.hh.summary: Defines the Handler interface with a notify method for event subscribers, providing the base class for components that need to respond to game events.

/src/include/event/event.hh.summary: Defines the event type enumeration for the event system, providing fine-grained categorization of events, system-specific event definitions, and event priority classification.

/src/include/event/Dispatcher.hh.summary: Defines the event dispatcher implementing the publish-subscribe pattern, managing event subscriptions and coordinating event distribution to registered handlers.

/src/include/worldmap/Worldmap.hh.summary: Provides the core world map interface for managing and visualizing the game world's spatial organization, supporting terrain representation and map generation.

/src/include/worldmap/MapColor.hh.summary: Defines color constants and functions for world map visualization, supporting terrain types and features with color-coded representation for ASCII map display.

/src/include/worldmap/Coordinate.hh.summary: Defines the coordinate system for world positions with operations for translation, validation, and distance calculations in the world's 2D/3D spatial representation system.

/src/include/worldmap/Quadtree.hh.summary: Implements spatial partitioning for efficient area queries and neighbor finding in the world map system, optimizing spatial searches with logarithmic complexity.

/src/include/worldmap/Region.hh.summary: Defines geographical regions in the world map with boundary management and property handling, organizing the world into named areas with distinct characteristics.

/src/include/conn/State.hh.summary: Defines the connection state machine for player login process, including states for character creation, authentication, and game entry with state transition management.

/src/include/affect/Affect.hh.summary: Defines the Affect class and related structures for status effects, including list management, comparators, and accessors for characters, objects, and rooms.

/src/include/affect/affect_list.hh.summary: Declares additional internal list operations for affects, including adding, removing, copying, deduplicating, and sorting affects within affect containers.

/src/include/affect/Type.hh.summary: Declares the affect::type enum class, listing all possible affect types such as buffs, debuffs, weapon flags, and object prefixes/suffixes with type-safe enumeration.

/src/include/affect/affect_int.hh.summary: Declares internal functions for manipulating lists of Affect objects, intended for internal use within affect modules with implementation details hidden from external callers.

/src/include/gem/gem.hh.summary: Defines the gem enhancement system for equipment customization, including socket creation, gem insertion/removal mechanics, gem types with different bonuses, and quality-based enhancement calculations.

/src/JSON/cJSON.cc.summary: Implements wrapper functions around the cJSON library, providing high-level convenience methods for file loading/saving and structured data serialization/deserialization operations used by the game's configuration system.

/src/deps/cJSON/cJSON.h.summary: Declares the cJSON library's interface, defining data structures for JSON representation and function prototypes for parsing, generating, and manipulating JSON data with minimal dependencies.

/src/deps/cJSON/cJSON.c.summary: Implements the cJSON library core functionality, providing comprehensive JSON parsing, manipulation, and generation capabilities with memory management, error handling, and data conversion facilities.

/src/event/Dispatcher.cc.summary: Implements the event dispatching system, managing event publication to subscribed handlers with careful iteration to handle subscription modifications during event processing.

/src/worldmap/Region.cc.summary: Implements geographical region management with boundary detection, point-in-polygon testing, region property management, and named region lookup for defining distinct areas within the game world.

/src/worldmap/Coordinate.cc.summary: Implements coordinate system operations including distance calculations, translations, vector mathematics, path calculations, and coordinate normalization for the world map system.

/src/worldmap/Worldmap.cc.summary: Implements a visual world map system with color-coded terrain representation, mapping coordinates to sector types.

/src/conn/ReadMOTDState.cc.summary: Implements regular message of the day display and transition to gameplay for normal players.

/src/conn/GetRaceState.cc.summary: Handles race selection during character creation.

/src/conn/GetAlignmentState.cc.summary: Handles alignment selection during character creation.

/src/conn/PlayingState.cc.summary: Implements active gameplay state handling by passing commands to the alias system. Final state in connection flow.

/src/conn/State.cc.summary: Implements state machine initialization with static instances of all connection states, providing centralized access to the connection state system.

/src/conn/ReadNewMOTDState.cc.summary: Implements comprehensive new player welcome sequence including class selection, race selection, skill selection, MOTD display, and new character setup.

/src/conn/GetSexState.cc.summary: Handles gender selection during character creation.

/src/conn/GetGuildState.cc.summary: Handles guild selection during character creation.

/src/conn/GetWeaponState.cc.summary: Handles starting weapon selection during character creation.

/src/conn/GetOldPassState.cc.summary: Handles password verification for existing characters.

/src/conn/GetDeityState.cc.summary: Handles deity selection during character creation.

/src/conn/BreakConnectState.cc.summary: Implements the break connection state handler, including reconnect attempts and input handling.

/src/conn/GetNameState.cc.summary: Handles character name input, validating against naming rules and existing players.

/src/conn/ReadIMOTDState.cc.summary: Implements immortal message of the day display and transition to gameplay for immortal players.

/src/conn/ConfirmNewNameState.cc.summary: Implements name confirmation during character creation.

/src/conn/ClosedState.cc.summary: Implements the closed connection state handler, logging unexpected input as bugs.

/src/conn/ConfirmNewPassState.cc.summary: Implements password confirmation for new character creation.

/src/conn/RollStatsState.cc.summary: Implements character attribute generation system including stat rolling, race/class modifiers, rerolling limits, validation against min/max values, and final stat distribution.

/src/conn/GetNewPassState.cc.summary: Handles new password creation for new characters.

/src/conn/GetMudExpState.cc.summary: Handles MUD experience questioning during character creation.

/src/affect/affect_room.cc.summary: Implements room-specific affect operations for area-based effects.

/src/affect/affect_cache_array.cc.summary: Implements caching mechanisms for affect lookups and updates.

/src/affect/affect_table.cc.summary: Implements lookup tables and type conversions for the affect system.

/src/affect/affect_char.cc.summary: Implements character-specific affect operations including adding, removing, and modifying affects.

/src/affect/affect_list.cc.summary: Implements list management operations for affects including add, remove, and deduplication.

/src/affect/affect_obj.cc.summary: Implements object-specific affect operations for applying and managing status effects on objects.

/src/affect/affect.cc.summary: Implements reusable callback functions, comparators, and core affect operations.

/src/gem/gem.cc.summary: Implements the gem socketable enhancement system allowing players to customize equipment with gems providing various bonuses, including socket creation, gem insertion/removal, and stat/ability modifications.
